tools.name: OmniMix VB.NET Frontend
tools.description: A customizable Forza Horizon 6 music radio supporting NetEase Cloud Music, QQ Music, and Bilibili imports.
tools.descriptionZh: 可以自定义的《地平线 6》音乐电台，支持网易云音乐、QQ 音乐和哔哩哔哩歌曲导入。

tools.name: FH6 Auction House Sniper
tools.description: A tool for monitoring the Forza Horizon 6 auction house.
tools.descriptionZh: 用于监控《极限竞速：地平线 6》拍卖行的工具。

tools.name: FH Language Combo Tool
tools.description: A tool for changing language combinations in Forza Horizon games.
tools.descriptionZh: 用于调整《极限竞速》系列游戏语言组合的工具。

tools.name: FH6Farm
tools.description: An assistive tool for obtaining Super Wheelspins.
tools.descriptionZh: 用于获取超级抽奖的辅助工具。

tools.name: FH6 Road Scanner
tools.description: A Forza Horizon 6 road exploration helper that scans the map row by row to help locate missed roads.
tools.descriptionZh: 《极限竞速：地平线 6》道路探索辅助工具，通过逐行扫描地图帮助定位遗漏道路。

tools.name: Virtual TCU
tools.description: A virtual transmission control unit with a browser dashboard and local WebSocket/HTTP service.
tools.descriptionZh: 虚拟变速箱控制单元，提供浏览器仪表盘及本地 WebSocket/HTTP 服务。

tools.name: HorizonHaptics
tools.description: DualSense adaptive trigger and haptics support using FH6 Data Out telemetry.
tools.descriptionZh: 通过 FH6 Data Out 遥测为 DualSense 控制器提供自适应扳机与触觉反馈。

tools.name: Forza Painter FH6
tools.description: Converts images into Forza Horizon 6 livery painting data.
tools.descriptionZh: 将图片转换为《极限竞速：地平线 6》涂装绘制数据。
